title: Tampere Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Tampere with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Tampere are extremely cold, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The city is experiencing a high number of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 12.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The low temperature and moderate wind speed of 9.0 km/h are contributing to the extreme cold, with a relative humidity of 47%.
conclusion: Implement emergency cold snap protocols immediately.
